matched_strings:
select poaa.ReadAccess, poaa.UpdateAccess
from PrincipalObjectAttributeAccessBase poaa with (nolock)
where poaa.ObjectId = @ObjectId and poaa.ObjectTypeCode = @ObjectTypeCode
   and poaa.AttributeId = @AttributeId	
   and poaa.PrincipalId = @PrincipalId

select cast(MAX(cast(poaa.ReadAccess as tinyint)) as bit) as ReadAccess, 
		cast(MAX(cast(poaa.UpdateAccess as tinyint)) as bit) as UpdateAccess  
from PrincipalObjectAttributeAccessBase poaa with (nolock)
join SystemUserPrincipals sup with (nolock) on sup.PrincipalId = poaa.PrincipalId
where poaa.ObjectId = @ObjectId and poaa.ObjectTypeCode = @ObjectTypeCode
   and poaa.AttributeId = @AttributeId	
   and sup.SystemUserId = @PrincipalId
name: Microsoft.Crm.BusinessEntities.SecurityLibrary::GetSharedAttributePermissions
